latin: Aranea-Versus. non unus sed multi Aranea-Viri existunt — in multis mundis. quisque filo pendet, quisque pugnat, quisque cadit et surgit.

questions.prompt: What do all Spider-People have in common?
questions.target: They each hang from a web, fight, fall, and rise again
choices: They each hang from a web, fight, fall, and rise again
They all live in New York

translation: The Spider-Verse. Not one but many Spider-People exist — in many worlds. Each one hangs by a thread, each one fights, each one falls and rises.
